title: LS2 LS2 FF406 Carbon

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF406 Carbon utilizes a multi-density EPS liner sandwiched between an outer carbon fiber shell and an inner ABS layer to maximize impact absorption while minimizing overall mass. The aerodynamic profile features a streamlined chin bar and integrated spoiler designed to reduce drag coefficients at highway speeds, directly contributing to the low noise floor measured at 100 km/h. Ventilation channels are strategically routed through the visor mechanism and cheek pads to ensure consistent airflow without compromising structural rigidity.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the LS2 FF406 Carbon, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising performance on the track or open road. Crafted from premium carbon fiber, this helmet offers a significant weight reduction compared to traditional composite shells, reducing rider fatigue during long-distance rides while maintaining superior safety standards.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF406 Carbon: a lightweight full-face motorcycle helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, carbon fiber construction, and optimized aerodynamics for high-speed riding comfort.
